hero.title: Dr. Erkinbek Dzhamanbaev

problem.title: Do these situations sound familiar?

problem.solutionsTitle: Medicine of Coherence offers a solution
problems: Severe multi-system dysfunction without clear diagnosis
Complex cases — each specialist sees only part of the picture
10+ years of chronic pain and comorbidities without solution
solutions: 6D systemic analysis — we see what others miss
Integration of evidence-based diagnostics and systemic clinical logic
70-85% symptom reduction in patients with 10+ year history
Restoration of systemic coherence, not just symptom suppression
problem.transition: We don't just treat symptoms. We restore your body's coherence.

method6d.title: The 6D Navigation System
method6d.subtitle: Six clinical vectors of coherence for complex comorbidities and severe cases
method6d.description: A map, not a protocol. A diagnostic mapping and navigation system that builds an individual coherence recovery pathway for each patient. Each dimension (D) answers a key question about the system's condition and identifies the 'bottleneck'.

dimensions.name: D1: Diagnosis
dimensions.subtitle: Evidence-Based Medical Diagnosis
dimensions.description: Evidence-based medical diagnosis (ICD, ICF, EBM). Creating a functional map of dysfunctions and system resources, beyond a single diagnostic label.

dimensions.name: D2: Dysfunction
dimensions.subtitle: Pattern Correction
dimensions.description: Recognition and correction of maladaptive patterns. Breathing and movement patterns, myofascial release, postural correction.

dimensions.name: D3: Disconnection
dimensions.subtitle: Brain-Body Reconnection
dimensions.description: Restoring brain-body connection and expanding the nervous system's 'window of tolerance'. Breaking free from chronic hyperactivation or apathy.

dimensions.name: D4: Direction
dimensions.subtitle: Biochemical Foundation
dimensions.description: Creating optimal internal environment through nutrition, nutraceuticals, and chronobiology. Support for system recovery.

dimensions.name: D5: Development
dimensions.subtitle: Cognitive Reprogramming
dimensions.description: Changing maladaptive cognitive-behavioral programs that sustain the vicious cycle of pain and anxiety.

dimensions.name: D6: Depth
dimensions.subtitle: Life Integration
dimensions.description: Transition from 'I am being treated' to 'this is now my way of living'. Relapse prevention and long-term stability.

publications.title: Medicine of Coherence: A Regulation-Oriented Framework

testimonials.title: Patient Stories
testimonials.subtitle: Real cases. Real results. Anonymized for privacy.
testimonials.disclaimer: Results may vary. All cases anonymized per GDPR.

1.quote: Every doctor said my tests were normal. Dr. Erkin was the first to explain WHY I felt broken despite normal labs. After 6 weeks, I woke up without pain for the first time in years.

2.quote: Two burnouts in three years. Antidepressants stopped working. The 6D assessment revealed HPA-axis dysfunction that no one had checked. Three months later, I'm back to running my company.

3.quote: Rheumatologist said nothing. Neurologist said nothing. Gastroenterologist said nothing. Dr. Erkin connected dots no one else saw. Finally, I have a diagnosis that makes sense.

4.quote: Brain fog, fatigue, heart palpitations — doctors told me to wait it out. The 6D protocol addressed autonomic dysfunction directly. I got my brain back.

5.quote: I spent €40,000 on treatments that didn't work. €100 diagnostic showed what everyone missed: my pain wasn't psychological, it was neuroinflammation. Everything changed after that.

6.quote: My TSH was perfect but I couldn't get out of bed. Dr. Erkin explained T4-to-T3 conversion at cellular level. No other doctor ever mentioned this. Now I understand my body.

7.quote: Six years of 'it's just stress' and 'eat more fiber.' The 6D approach found vagus nerve dysfunction. Not IBS. Not anxiety. A biological pattern that could be fixed.

8.quote: I stopped going to doctors — they made me feel crazy. Dr. Erkin was different. He listened, mapped everything, and showed me a path forward. For the first time, I have hope based on biology, not promises.
